programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A crew of robbers guns down an Atlanta father; a detective working her first case suspects that she may be pursuing the wrong suspect.

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a 20-year-old woman is found in her apartment a day after being brutally stabbed over 40 times. In Mobile, dozens of bullets are fired at a busy intersection leaving two men dead in a crashed car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: An all-American dad's desire for sex with a 14-year-old triggers a takedown that exposes his deviant double life. Then, creepy social media messages to a schoolgirl reveal a dangerous predator. A police officer plays decoy to lure a predator.

programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects, before they strike again.

programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Police on the ground and in the air pursue suspects as they commit multiple carjackings; officers chase a murder suspect through a crowded big box store; police pursue a convicted felon at speeds over 110 miles an hour.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: The pursuit of a convicted felon ends with a head-on collision with a police cruiser; a shoplifting suspect shoots at police and then sets his own house on fire during a standoff; air and ground units coordinate during a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A man wanted for robbery and carjacking leads sheriff's deputies on a chase through crowded city streets; police get in a foot chase with an attempted murder suspect; a late-night, 145-mile-an-hour highway pursuit; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; deputies race to extract a mother and her daughters from their truck after a fleeing suspect crashes into them; fish and wildlife officers pursue a fugitive attempting to escape by swimming away.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; after a high-speed chase ends with a crash on the highway, the suspect shocks officers by attacking one of the accident victims with a knife.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; a man wanted for carjacking runs out of the road during a high-speed chase; an officer climbs on the hood of a car while trying to prevent a fugitive from fleeing.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A high-speed chase across three states; a woman pulled over for speeding flees the scene but still manages to obey traffic laws; suspected auto thieves flee a hit-and-run to hide on a golf course.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: An accused car thief jumps off a 36-foot bridge to avoid capture; an armed fugitive on the run breaks into a building full of law school students; a DUI suspect flees by car, foot, and water before deputies capture him.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a Houston cop seeks access to a mom's two kids, detectives go all in to stop one of their own; detectives team up to catch a predator with his pants down; two brave victims help Det. Godwin to expose a stepdad's horrific secret.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator with a disturbing past targets a minor, law enforcement agencies team up for a high-stakes takedown at a busy airport; then, a mom uncovers a predator's twisted scheme; detectives unmask one of their boldest predators yet.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a teacher's deviant messages to a minor surface, Detective Godwin pushes to uncover the extent of his crimes; a predator's warped idea of love triggers a dramatic takedown; detectives snare a predator who wants both boys and girls.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked woman is arrested for stealing a sheriff's pickup truck; a gym goer loses his cool and his clothing; and a golf pro spectator streaks into the spotlight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; in Vegas, a man gets naked on top of a poker table; a mom fires multiple rounds at a police station; a citizen dressed in a poop emoji protests in court; and more!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man with a late-night urge to relieve himself picks an unusual spot to go; a fugitive leads police on a wild foot chase down the middle of a busy highway; a woman involved in a fender bender has an over-the-top reaction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; police find a raccoon with a meth pipe in a woman's car; a man is arrested while paying his taxes; a landscaper drives a tractor into a cop car; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A desperate woman needs to poop during a traffic stop; a mom is busted sneaking into a school dressed as her daughter; a man jumps into a store's 24,000-gallon aquarium and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a tenant and her landlord have a dispute with poop; a cowboy rides his horse on a busy highway; an impaired man drives with a traffic light on his car and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A hyped-up man goes toe to toe with police; a woman flips off fellow drivers while dancing in the street; a pilot is arrested for allegedly stealing a plane; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the police chases from across the country; a man steals a front loader and evades police, a mother flees from the police holding a baby, officers chase a man in a stolen mail truck and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man hurls furniture onto a busy NYC street from atop a skyscraper; a passenger allegedly tries to sneak onto a full flight; a self-proclaimed bride is arrested for DUI on her supposed wedding day.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.sub-title: Meatballs With a Chance of Poison
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to a shocking arrest; a driver flees an accident with a man clinging to the hood of her car; a man tries to poison his nephew's sandwich.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads to one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man hangs on the hood of his car while his ex-girlfriend drives it on the highway; an intoxicated woman flees from airport police on a motorized suitcase; a man take a selfie with his daughter inside an elephant enclosure at the zoo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.sub-title: Can I Show You My Butt?
programme.desc: A senior citizen wields an unusual weapon, her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; a man in a crazy costume takes police on a wild chase.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man drives through a store hours after having trashed it; a Florida neighborhood falls victim to shocking deliveries; a beachgoer causes mayhem after breaking free from a police car.

programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael makes a pasta dish with a creamy pea sauce that's layered with fresh pecorino cheese, baby greens, and sautéed Guanciale, an Italian salt-cured meat coated with sage and rosemary.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: Beef Fajitas and Bean Dip Nachos
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a beef fajita dinner cooked a la plancha; the beef is marinated in a spicy sauce, served on charred tortillas, and accompanied by a platter of decadent bean dip nachos.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: A married couple gets divorced in the middle of a home renovation, giving the flippers an opportunity they cannot turn down; the team soon learns that taking on someone else's flip also comes with someone else's problems.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team finds a ramshackle house down the street from a new school opening in a couple of months; a glut of plumbing and roof problems, plus a tree-toppling disaster, may cause the team to miss their sales window before the school year starts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Thanks to one of his Zombie House Buyers, Dolmar scores a waterfront deal in Holiday, Florida, with one big catch: the house had a fire. With two of three floors charred, hurricane setbacks, and material delays, can the Dealmaker revive this burnt zombie, or will his profit go up in smoke?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is faced with a big dilemma, do flipping and friendship go together?; his longtime friend Carrie, friend to his wife Clair, has fallen on some tough times and wants James' help; recently divorced and eager for financial freedom, Carrie convinces James she can handle the project even though she is a complete novice; together, they tackle a mid-century modern disaster with an unfinished basement, small kitchen, and a single main-floor bathroom.

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Blue Ridge Mayor Rhonda and her husband Davey are looking to escape the public eye with a mountain home outside of town; beyond privacy, they're in search of serenity, an oversized primary suite and room for the grandkids to play; will epic mountain views or waterside privacy get their vote?

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Chad and Kelsey are leaving Atlanta to marry and move to Blue Ridge; from stone and wood custom finishes to a three-car garage and a fully equipped outdoor grilling station, each home ticks a different box; which one will get the "I do?".

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Assisting with Lance's notoriously big bump that halted his rap dreams; Shelby has lost control of the mystery bumps she has developed; Dr. Lee proposes a long-shot cure for Jante, who has been losing pigment in her skin as well as her confidence.
